**Zulip-ready when all 6 reach 8/10.** ETA: 1-2 days for interim disclosure-pivot path; 1-3 months for paper-axiom-closed path per Daniel new bar.

## Trajectory

**Vacuity cascade**: 6 discoveries in 36h (mg-e2e9 → mg-74d2 → mg-5c32 → mg-82fc → mg-2970 → mg-ac13). Pattern validated: each discovery sharpened the audit until cascade bottomed out at substantive paper-rigorous backbone. Daniel's persistent skepticism was the right driver.

**Both arcs converge**: Frankl + OneThird both land at disclosure-pivot shape (smallN-unconditional via enumeration + concrete paths + largeN-paper-axiomatised via well-cited literature). Math content preserved; Lean-delivery boundary honestly disclosed.

**Cumulative spend**: ~25M tokens across both arcs in last 48h. Most expensive: 10 Z2 sub-splits (~3M) + 6 audit cycles (~3M). Worth it for the architectural clarity.

**Risk watchlist**:
- mg-1b2b execution risk: mayor picking from 5 attention items + 7 revisions per my "use your judgement" delegation; quality of pick depends on mayor.
- mg-234e rewire risk: structural Lean refactor; expect possible AMBER with sub-split contingency.
- Literature citation risk: Steps 1-7 / prop:72 cascade + Ahlswede-Daykin/FKG 1971 — both citation-audited (mg-ee54 + mg-4582), but Zulip-reviewer scrutiny still ahead.
